source_section.title_label_raw: Zones and Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses

sections.title_label_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses
provisions.text: Subject to Sections 33, 37, 38, and 39, and except for the CDD-2 and CDD-1 zones, and transportation reserves, which are addressed in Sections 34, 35, and 36, the use of land is regulated as follows:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses
provisions.text: The first column of Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D list each use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses
provisions.text: The remaining columns of Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D correspond to each zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses
provisions.text: Header cells shaded black with white text within Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D (e.g., "RESIDENTIAL", "COMMERCIAL") are for organizational purposes only;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses
provisions.text: Each use listed in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D is defined in Part XVII;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses
provisions.text: A black dot () within Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D indicates that the use in that row is permitted in the zone of that column, and subject to all other applicable provisions of this By-law;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses
provisions.text: A white circle containing a number in black text (e.g., ①) within Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D indicates that the use in that row is permitted in the zone of that column, subject to additional conditions in a corresponding footnote below Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D, and subject to all other applicable provisions of this By-law;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses
provisions.text: The absence of a black dot (), or a white circle containing a number in black text (e.g., ①), indicates that the use in that row is prohibited in the zone of that column; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permitted Uses Interpretation of Permitted Uses
provisions.text: Where a use is defined in Part XVII, the definition may be deemed to include any similar use, except where expressly excluded. Additional Provisions Elsewhere in this By-law

sections.title_label_raw: No development permit shall be issued for a use permitted in Tables

provisions.heading_context_raw: No development permit shall be issued for a use permitted in Tables
provisions.text: No development permit shall be issued for a use permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D, unless the use meets all applicable requirements of this By-law. Developments in the CDD-2 Zone

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the CDD-2 zone, without a development agreement, shall be commercial uses or institutional uses permitted in the CEN-2 zone. (RC-Jul 12/22;E-Aug 22/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 34(3) and Section 490, the only additions or new buildings, containing commercial uses or institutional uses that are permitted in the CDD-2 zone, without a development agreement, shall be: (RC-Jul 12/22;E-Aug 22/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: one addition, to a building that is existing on the coming into force date of this By-law, of no more than:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: 1,000 square metres in floor area, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: a maximum height, as shown on Schedule 15; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: one new building, on a lot that is existing and vacant on the coming into force date of this By-law, of no more than:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: 1,000 square metres in floor area, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: a maximum height, as shown on Schedule 15.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: Within the Mic Mac Mall Lands (ML) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3F, only one addition to a main building is permitted, without a development agreement, and shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: not exceed 25,000 square metres of floor area;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: meet the built form and siting requirements for the CEN-2 zone, contained in Part V, Chapter 5, excluding the following:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: maximum front or flanking setbacks under Section 160,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: maximum front or flanking setback exemptions under Section 161,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: maximum streetwall heights under Section 164,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: minimum streetwall heights under Section 165,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: streetwall stepbacks under Section 166,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: recessed portions and cantilevers within streetwalls under Section 167, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: maximum building dimensions under Subsection 174(1); and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: not exceed the following maximum building dimension requirements for the portion of the building that is above a height of 14.0 metres, if the addition results in a building that exceeds a height of 30.0 meters from the average finished grade: (RC-May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: a building depth of 35.0 metres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: a building width of 40.0 metres; and (RC-May 23/24;E-June 13/24

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 490, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: an average floor area of 900 square metres per storey as calculated for the tower portion of the building. (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24) Developments in the CDD-1 Zone

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the CDD-1 zone, without a development agreement, shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: existing uses; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: uses permitted in the ER-2 zone. (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: Subject to Section 491, the only additions or new buildings that are permitted in the CDD-1 zone, without a development agreement, shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: one addition, to a building that is existing on the coming into force date of this By-law, of no more than:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: 1,000 square metres in floor area, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: a maximum height as shown on Schedule 15; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: one new building containing a use permitted ER-2 zone and that: (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: is on a lot that is existing and vacant on the coming into force date of this By-law, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Section 491, the only uses that are permitted in the
provisions.text: meets the built form requirements of the ER-2 zone. (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24) Uses in a Transportation Reserve

sections.title_label_raw: All development is prohibited in a transportation reserve, as shown on

provisions.heading_context_raw: All development is prohibited in a transportation reserve, as shown on
provisions.text: All development is prohibited in a transportation reserve, as shown on Schedules 4, 5, and 6. Obnoxious Uses Prohibited

sections.title_label_raw: No owner or occupier of a lot shall undertake or conduct any

provisions.heading_context_raw: No owner or occupier of a lot shall undertake or conduct any
provisions.text: No owner or occupier of a lot shall undertake or conduct any obnoxious use. Pedestrian-Oriented Commercial Streets

sections.title_label_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial street, as shown on Schedule 7, only the following uses may be located within the ground floor of a building abutting the streetline:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: retail use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: restaurant use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: drinking establishment use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: financial institution use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: medical clinic use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: personal service use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: minor spectator venue use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: fitness centre use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: grocery store use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: local commercial use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: hotel use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: micro-brewery use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: micro-distillery use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: cultural use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: community services use; (RCCC-Dec10/25;E Dec31/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: university or college use; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: pedestrian entrances and lobbies for any other use permitted in the zone.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: In any CEN-2, CEN-1, or COR zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial street, as shown on Schedule 7, only the following uses may be located within the ground floor of a building abutting the streetline:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: all uses permitted in Subsection 38(1); and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: office uses.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: One garage door and an associated ramp to access internal motor vehicle parking spaces or internal off-street loading spaces shall be permitted along a pedestrian-oriented commercial street, if:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: the motor vehicle parking spaces or off-street loading spaces are located on a floor level above or below the ground floor; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: repealed (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: an alternative access from the pedestrian-oriented commercial street is necessary to mitigate potential conflict by reason of traffic generation, safe access to and egress from the motor vehicle parking space or internal off-street loading space. (RCCC-Jan 24/24;E-Feb 9/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: Notwithstanding Subsections 38(1) and 38(2), for a new multi - unit dwelling that begins construction before April 1, 2028 along any pedestrian -oriented commercial street, as shown on Schedule 7,

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: at least 20% of the ground floor of the building abutting the streetline shall be occupied by commercial uses listed in 38(1) or 38 (2); and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: the remaining ground floor of a building abutting the streetline shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: in an DD or DH zone, a permitted use listed in subsection 38(1) or section 69, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: in any CEN -2, CEN-1, or COR zone, a permitted use listed in subsection 38(2) or section 69.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: For the purpose of calculating the 20% in 38(4)(a), the following shall not be counted:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: lobbies,

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: elevators,

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: mechanical areas,

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: vestibules,

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: garages, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In a DD or DH zone, along any pedestrian-oriented commercial
provisions.text: ramps to access internal motor vehicle spaces. (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26) Special Uses

sections.title_label_raw: A publicly sponsored convention centre together with retail, hotel,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A publicly sponsored convention centre together with retail, hotel,
provisions.text: A publicly sponsored convention centre together with retail, hotel, residential, or office uses, and underground parking, is permitted within the Nova Centre (NC) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3B. In accordance with Schedule 8 of this By-law, the development shall include a vehicular and pedestrian passageway extending from Prince Street to Sackville Street. lot only. ③ Use is permitted within a mixed-use building that has no less than 75% of its floor area occupied by residential uses. ⑬ Use is permitted within the Dartmouth Waterfront (DW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3A, and the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3B. ⑮ Use is permitted, except within the Halifax Grain Elevator (HGE) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3F. New or expanded residential uses within the Halifax Grain Elevator (HGE) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3F, shall only be permitted by development agreement, in accordance with Section 497. ㉑ Use is not permitted, except for access and servicing functions to a lot or portion of a lot that permits the use. ㉔ Use is permitted accessory to a residential use provided that the dwelling unit is the primary residence of the operator, in accordance with Section 53. (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23) ㉚ Use is permitted, provided accessory office uses and accessory personal service uses must not exceed 25% of the total floor area of the building (RCCC-Dec10/25;E Dec31/25) C&D transfer, processing, and disposal use Heavy industrial use Obnoxious use Salvage use ④ Use is permitted if entirely contained within a building, excluding parking and loading facilities. ⑤ Retail use shall not exceed a maximum gross floor area of 300.0 square metres per premises. This requirement shall not apply to a building supply establishment or a retail use accessory to a permitted industrial use. ⑦ Use is permitted within the Mixed Industrial Commercial (MIC) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3F. ⑧ Use is permitted on lands identified as a landmark building site on Schedule 9, as per the requirements of Section 43. ⑪ Use is permitted on the ground floor of a university or college building, and the floor area of the use cannot exceed 25% of the total floor area of the building. ⑫ Use is permitted in conjunction with another permitted main use. ㉔ Use is permitted accessory to a residential use provided that the dwelling unit is the primary residence of the operator, in accordance with Section 53. (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23) ㉕ Use is restricted to publicly owned or operated ferry terminals. (RC-Jan 9/24;E-Feb 9/24) (RC-Oct 7/25;E-Dec 3/25)
